scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply content-curator-db --local --config wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply content-curator-db --remote --env production --config wrangler.toml
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.validate:e2e: npm run validate && npm run validate:phase11
